title: デビュー戦の後に・最初のご褒美

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How did I do? Did I run well?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was desperate to make sure I didn't embarrass
you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I ran well. Now then, a reward for
giving me the chance to debut...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Who's a good trainer?! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but... this is really tugging at
my heartstrings. I'll never forget coddling you
right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this again at the Classics—at the Satsuki
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I smile and nod as I watch Super Creek tearing up
a little.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! A photo! We need to take a photo to
commemorate your debut.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Stand there. Okay, make sure to smile! ♪
choice_data_list:
Shouldn't you be the one getting your photo
taken?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, right. I guess that works too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's take a photo together then! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The camera captures an image of the two of us
smiling bashfully.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, we need to think about what our next race
should be.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is the Classics. If we want to aim for
that, then...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How about this race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes are focused on...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The Sumire Stakes. I think this is the perfect
stepping stone towards the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sumire Stakes... One would normally choose
Satsuki Sho trial races like the Yayoi Sho or the
Spring Stakes instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I ask if she has a particular reason for her choice.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I mean, isn't the name just adorable? Sumire
flowers are so pretty.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I can do my best just based on the
name. Doesn't it make you feel buoyant and
carefree?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, thanks for being so understanding! That
settles it then. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If there are any sumire flowers blooming at the
racecourse central plaza, let's have ourselves a
little picnic and enjoy the view. Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I prioritize Super Creek's feelings, and we lock in
the Sumire Stakes for the next race.
